source: The curve rises gently until 1740 and then bends sharply upward (see Fig. 3), which is the shape that made the whole argument seem inevitable to a generation of readers. It is worth remembering how little the bend rests on. Three of the underlying series are estimates built from tax receipts, one is a reconstruction from wage books that survive for two towns, and the earliest points are frankly guesses, offered as such in a footnote and repeated ever afterwards without one.

expect.why: A pointer to a figure the listener cannot see.

notes: A cross-reference to a figure that exists only on the page. A model must remove it whole, including the abbreviating period, and must not treat the numerals elsewhere in the passage as the same kind of notation.
